text.message: Almost want to test your politeness the same way one might test devs
polite guy - not very polite to make us wait?
I am deep in despair and confusion
that was a crazy pick for sure
That's a dream result for first pick
red any shot u can trade a wood here to not go 6-3?
i almost want to pay you to take 6-3
Is a 2:1 not a free wood?
im trying to give u one
lol i rolled the sheep anyway
trade me next brick to open the 8
Not worth it at the moment sir
can we just play like regular people
dude this is all too complicated just play the game fr
coz last game people were being like this as well
asking for traded back after a misclick?
Blue we're being polite and nice
yeah sorry blue, no stress just a game
No need to be lemony and persnicketty
thats exactly what i saying red
just a game not rocket science
hahaha the rock correction is funny
black if u trade an ore rn
i can give future free ore
What are we doing good sir
i am also trying to get the tree port remember?
I have the settle and then some
thank you for letting me know
will give free card for nb
Blue I'd say personally when we are both so far behind
i think the game is wrapped up
Well at least you had fun right blue?
